text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight, time for the Takarazuka Kinen! I'm gonna
wrap up this spring season by headin' home to
Kansai with my head held high!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer, ya know what the goal is, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! So I'm gonna need a solid plan from ya.
We gotta win, no matter what! We're gonna win
and give my fam hope!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If I win, I know Dad'll get back on track too! So I gotta get through this first!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh... and one more thing. I wanna show that gal
from the regionals my skills too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Tama, I knew you saw me as a rival!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ack, Inari?! I didn't know you were competin' in
this one too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is another racer from the regionals.
Raised in Oi, she's an Edo girl to the core.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh come onnn! I heard ya just now! "That gal from
the regionals" could only be me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wasn't talkin' about you! 'Sides, you're from the Tokyo regionals! You were probably born with a silver spoon in your mouth!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But, ya know what? Fine. Inari, let's settle this
right here, right now—Tokyo versus Kansai!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll show ya the true power of a Naniwa
upbringin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Get outta here! You'll be a cryin' mess when I'm
done with you, ya runt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap watches the sudden showdown unfold.
For the sake of her family, Tamamo Cross can't
afford to lose.
